'''lanacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okratini|okratini]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okratini|okratini]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lanacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lænæchæth || lænæchæj || lænæchæsh || lænæchæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lananachath || lananachaj || lananachash || lananacha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lanachath || lanachaj || lanachash || lanacha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lanafchafth || lanafchafj || lanafchafsh || lanafchaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || lanachatha || lanachaja || lanachasha || lanachaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || lanachath || lanachaj || lanachash || lanacha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || lanachathal || lanachajal || lanachashal || lanachakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || lanachaathatha || lanachaajaja || lanachaashasha || lanachaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || lanachathan || lanachajan || lanachashan || lanachakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || lanachathaoro || lanachajaoro || lanachashaoro || lanachakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
